The '''Mini-Torpedo Launcher''' was a [[Torpedo/Legends|torpedo]] launcher developed by [[Mon Cal Defenses]], which fired self-propelled mini-torpedoes that would detonate on impact. This weapon was primarily designed for underwater combat and was attachable to heavy underwater battle armor.
